meta_description: pirka noka Create clear word-order diagrams for translation, language learning, and linguistics teaching.
meta_keywords: word order, linguistics, translation, language learning, syntax visualization
meta_image_alt: Preview of the Word Order Illustrator with linked words across two languages.
input_guidance: itak eramuan kikay an yakun ani wa isam yakun ohap aytaksay’usarayep itakpo kosiusaraye. {delimiter} a=eywanke wa na nokanno a=usaraye easkay. {example} neno ene an hi ne.
footer_info: Tan aeywankep or wa e=kar noka anakne ciunkore tum konrusuy ka somo ki ruwe ne kusu, e=eywanke yakka, e=omante yakka, eani e=ramu kuni p e=ki easkay. Tan aeywankep e=asuraste yakka tan sos e=omante yakka en=kore yakun, eci=eyairayke wa.
confirm_delete_sentence: Tan itaksay a=isamka yak pirka ruwe an?
confirm_new: Asir itaksay a=kar yak pirka ruwe an? Ipe opitta a=isamka kusu ne.
